User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system, which can be a Dropshipper or an Admin-level role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: Email address of the user, used for login.

role.description: The role of the user, defining their permissions.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information about a user.

/roles_admin/{userId}.description: A document in this collection grants a user the Admin role.

/roles_orders_manager/{userId}.description: A document in this collection grants a user the Orders Manager role.

/roles_finance_manager/{userId}.description: A document in this collection grants a user the Finance Manager role.

/roles_merchant/{userId}.description: A document in this collection grants a user the Merchant role.
